name: nav-center
description: Codex skills for Nav Center beta onboarding, local workspace setup, diagnostics, and feedback drafting.

interface.shortDescription: Install Nav Center beta support skills
interface.longDescription: Codex skills for helping Nav Center beta users install the app, initialize a local workspace, import approved documents, prepare review-first master resume drafts, check Codex connectivity, and draft redacted beta feedback.
defaultPrompt: Use nav-center-codex-setup to help a beta tester verify the Nav Center install and initialize a local workspace.
Use nav-center-codex-setup to import approved resume, education, certification, and evaluation documents into Nav Center.
Use nav-center-beta-feedback to draft a redacted beta feedback report from tester notes and diagnostics.
